title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 107.
content:
There was an Old Person of Ems,
    Who casually fell in the Thames;
    And when he was found,
    They said he was drowned,
    That unlucky Old Person of Ems.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 107." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
